final:
module dram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire we,
    input wire [3:0] data_in,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
    reg [3:0] obf_memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            obf_memory <= data_in; // Write data to obf_memory
        end else begin
            data_out <= obf_memory; // Read data from obf_memory
        end
    end
endmodule
